children.heading: .—1So in original. No par. (2) has been enacted.1Technical coordination under intelsat agreements
children.label: 1 .—1So in original. No par. (2) has been enacted.1Technical coordination under intelsat agreements
children.text: Technical coordination shall not be used to impair competition or competitors, and shall be conducted under International Telecommunication Union procedures and not under Article XIV(d) of the INTELSAT Agreement.
